editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=3 trials available; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered.
Per-domain RoB 2.0 summary not attached to the included-trials table.
Pooled 0.85 diverges from Middleton 2019 benchmark (MD 13.80 [12.10, 15.40]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
DL estimator under-estimates τ² for k<10; add REML/Paule-Mandel sensitivity.
Effect not translated into absolute-risk difference / NNT for shared decision.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
